gt_sql: SELECT T1.SEX, T1.Birthday, T2.`Examination Date`, T2.Symptoms FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 163109
pred_sql:
SELECT p.SEX, p.Birthday, e."Examination Date", e.Symptoms
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.ID = 163109;
question: State the sex and birthday of patient ID '163109'. When was the examination taken and what symptom does the patient had.
